node.statement: SETUP I - RM PREDICTION: For global Haar U, the averaged purities are E_U Tr(ρ_B^2) = d^{-(g_{s,e}+1)N} + d^{-(g_{s,s}+r)N} and E_U Tr(ρ_{RB}^2) = d^{-(g_{s,e}+1+r)N} + d^{-g_{s,s}N}, giving I_c/N = min(g_{s,e}+1, g_{s,s}+r) - min(g_{s,e}+1+r, g_{s,s}). The Hashing bound H_2 = g_{s,s} - g_{s,e} ≤ 1-r determines the error-correction transition. [Ground truth: Eqs.(7-10), main.tex lines 173-200]
